problem: What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed?
hypothesis: Dopamine/serotonin reuptake inhibition with specificity may resolve What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed? by blocking at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
